_doc: Search space for the munchkin optimizer. A config picks one value per dimension, held PER capability tier (small/mid/large). Evidence-pruned: personas and emoji-encoding are EXCLUDED (personas cost -3 to -5pts on knowledge tasks per Wharton/USC; emoji-encoding rejected by our own AB_SYMBOLECT.md + tokenization waste). Register-tint stays the single measured glyph candidate (promptlab pattern R).

prompt_variant._note: A = live governor/role prompt; F = none. Candidate files (from propose.py) are passed as a path and override A.

format._note: How the system prompt is structured. Real but MODEL-DEPENDENT (up to 40% variance; gpt3.5~json, gpt4~md, claude~xml) -> tiered. Coarse wrap for now.

scaffold._note: Reasoning scaffold appended to the system prompt. Strongly capability-tiered (small models gain most; CoT barely emerges <100B).

optillm._note: Inference-time technique via the OptiLLM proxy (Phase 3). safe=false: routing change is structural -> human-gated. Cost-gated by the token ceiling.

decoding._note: Server launch params (require a relaunch -> deep-run only). Emitted as env consumed by run-*.sh.

thresholds._note: Loop-breaker / verify-gate knobs, emitted as env (live-overridable, no relaunch).

messages._note: Steer-text templates (lib/steer-texts.ts). Values are FREEFORM strings <=400 chars ({var} placeholders per template) — munchkin validates key membership + length, not enumerated values. Emitted as env, no relaunch.

excluded.persona: measured -3 to -5pts on knowledge accuracy (Wharton/USC) — tone only, not correctness
excluded.emoji_encoding: rejected by AB_SYMBOLECT.md; glyphs aren't the active ingredient; tokenization waste
